meaning: n.湖泊(位于非洲东南部的)尼亚萨湖
examples: At least 25 have been hacked to death or killed with poisoned arrows in Nyanza in the past few days.
The next greatest increase was in Nyanza province, which has the highest prevalence of HIV infection in Kenya.
It is reported that the majority of Nyanza Province, the treatment of AIDS patients get anti-retroviral AIDS drugs.
The Luo heartland is in the western Nyanza region, but they have a significant presence in the key urban centres.
Kenya's 4m or so Luos, most of them in Nyanza, voted overwhelmingly for Mr Odinga in the disputed election on December 27th.
